ddls:
CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "super_effective_against" TEXT /* Types that this type is super effective against */,
  "not_effective_against" TEXT /* Types that this type is not effective against */,
  "resistant_to" TEXT /* Types that this type is resistant to */,
  "weak_to" TEXT /* Types that this type is weak to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "move_name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the move */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the move */,
  "power" INTEGER /* Power of the move */,
  "accuracy" INTEGER /* Accuracy of the move */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* Power points of the move */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* Description of the move's effect */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the move */,
  "damage_class" TEXT /* Damage class of the move */,
  "contest_type" TEXT /* Contest type of the move */,
  "contest_effect" TEXT /* Contest effect of the move */,
  "super_contest_effect" TEXT /* Super contest effect of the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "pokemon_name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the primary type of the Pokémon */,
  "type2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the secondary type of the Pokémon */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the Pokémon */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the Pokémon */,
  "base_experience" INTEGER /* Base experience of the Pokémon */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Growth rate of the Pokémon */,
  "ev_yield" TEXT /* EV yield of the Pokémon */,
  "base_stats" TEXT /* Comma-separated string of base stats (HP, Attack, Defense, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type2_id FOREIGN KEY ("type2_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type1_id FOREIGN KEY ("type1_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_moves" (
  "pokemon_move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the association of a Pokémon with a move */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Pokémon */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method by which the Pokémon learns the move */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon learns the move */,
  "learn_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the Pokémon learns the move */,
  "mastery_level" INTEGER /* Level of mastery the Pokémon achieves in the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_moves_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_moves_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "type_effectiveness" (
  "effectiveness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the effectiveness relationship */,
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move's type */,
  "target_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target Pokémon's type */,
  "effectiveness_ratio" REAL /* Ratio representing the effectiveness of the move against the target type */,
  "effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the move against the target type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("effectiveness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_effectiveness_target_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_type_effectiveness_move_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "date_edited" TEXT /* Date the review was last edited */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_reviews_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move */,
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the battle */,
  "use_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the move was used in the battle */,
  "turn" INTEGER /* Turn number in which the move was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_usage_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_usage_battle_id FOREIGN KEY ("battle_id") REFERENCES battles ("battle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battles" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "trainer1_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first trainer */,
  "trainer2_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second trainer */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* Date of the battle */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the winning trainer */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the battle */,
  "generation" TEXT /* Generation of the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_trainer1_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer1_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_trainer2_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer2_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battles_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Name of the trainer */,
  "team" TEXT /* Name of the trainer's Pokémon team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins the trainer has */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses the trainer has */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the trainer */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)
